Who Are We?

George Zigler and Erica Lanier are the proud owners and culinary force behind Zig's Kitchen Catering & Carry Out — a business rooted in passion, flavor, and genuine hospitality.

👨‍🍳 George ZiglerGeorge brings a deep appreciation for quality food and hands-on service. He believes great meals have the power to bring people together and create lasting memories. His commitment to consistency, flavor, and customer satisfaction is the foundation of Zig's Kitchen.

👩‍🍳 Erica LanierErica complements that vision with creativity, organization, and a heart for community. Known for her attention to detail and warm approach, she ensures every client experience — from carry-out orders to full-scale catered events — is seamless, welcoming, and memorable.

Together, they combine craftsmanship and care to deliver thoughtfully prepared meals for any occasion. Their mission: serve crafted, flavorful food that feels personal, celebratory, and made with purpose.

Our Services

🔥 On-Site BBQ Smoker
Slow-smoked meats prepared live at your event for bold, unforgettable flavor that fills the air and brings the crowd.
🐟 On-Site Fish Fry
Fresh, golden-crispy fish fried right on-site and served piping hot — a crowd favorite every time.
🍽️ Specialized & Custom Menus
Every event is different. We craft custom menus tailored to your occasion, dietary needs, group size, and unique preferences.

Not Just Food. It's An Experience.

Built on Fire. Served with Flavor.

The Zig's Flavor Experience

🔥 The Pitmaster Classic
Perfect for casual gatherings & backyard-style events
  • ✔ Slow-smoked chicken & pulled pork
  • ✔ Two classic sides
  • ✔ Fresh bread & house BBQ sauces
  • ✔ On-site smoker setup & service
⭐ MOST POPULAR
⭐ The Zig's Smokehouse Experience
Great for larger celebrations & crowd-pleasers
  • ✔ Smoked ribs, chicken & pulled pork
  • ✔ Three signature sides
  • ✔ Cornbread or dinner rolls
  • ✔ House-made sauces & toppings
  • ✔ On-site smoker & serving staff
🏆 The All-Out Smoke Show
Ideal for festivals, corporate events & big parties
  • ✔ Full BBQ spread: brisket, ribs, chicken & pulled pork
  • ✔ Four sides & fresh bread
  • ✔ Live on-site smoking experience
  • ✔ Professional setup, service & breakdown
🐟 The Classic Fry
Simple, fresh, and always a hit
  • ✔ Golden-fried fish prepared on-site
  • ✔ Hushpuppies or fries
  • ✔ Coleslaw
  • ✔ Tartar sauce & hot sauce
🎨 Customization Available
All packages can be tailored to include:
  • ✔ Additional proteins or sides
  • ✔ Vegetarian or dietary-friendly options
  • ✔ Specialized or themed menus
  • ✔ Portion adjustments for any group size
